offers.name: FrankX Newsletter
offers.primaryCta: Subscribe and reply with the workflow you want to build next.
offers.promise: A useful weekly operating note for creators and operators building with AI.
offers.guardrail: No income claims, no fake certainty, no urgency theater.

offers.name: Builder Lab Primer
offers.primaryCta: Join the primer when the first cohort opens.
offers.promise: Turn the weekly idea into one working artifact.
offers.guardrail: The promise is artifact completion, not business results.

offers.name: FrankX Inner Circle
offers.primaryCta: Reply to request an Inner Circle invite.
offers.promise: A closer loop for founders, creators, and operators who want direct signal and operating artifacts.
offers.guardrail: Founding access is curated and approval based.

offers.name: Agentic Creator OS
offers.primaryCta: Ask for the ACOS setup path.
offers.promise: Installable operating system patterns for content, agents, and creator workflows.
offers.guardrail: Product claims stay tied to concrete workflows and visible artifacts.

offers.name: Alliance and Enterprise Advisory
offers.promise: Architecture, rollout, and governance help for teams building AI operating systems.
offers.guardrail: No blanket transformation claims before discovery.
